candidates.why: Primary top-line revenue label; duplicated numeric values with 'Total Revenue'. Prefer this as first priority.
Duplicate naming of total revenues; include as second-priority alternative in case of label changes over time.
Finance income, not operating revenue; should not be used for total revenue.
Investment income, not core revenue.
Aggregated non-operating result, not revenue.
Tax line, unrelated to revenue.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive income for the period
candidates.why: Bottom-line comprehensive income, not top-line revenue.

variables.notes: Both 'Total revenues' and 'Total Revenue' hold identical figures; treated as alternative labels over time, with 'Total revenues' as primary.

candidates.why: Direct fuel cost for shipping operations, clearly a core cost of goods/services sold.
Direct voyage-related operating costs, fits COGS/cost of services.
Direct vessel hire costs necessary to generate revenue; appropriate COGS component for a shipping company.
Direct ship operating costs (crew, maintenance, etc.); appropriate as COGS.
Overhead SG&A-type cost, should be excluded from COGS and mapped to SG&A instead.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Clearly SG&A labor cost, not COGS.
SG&A bucket, not COGS.
Financial expense, not production cost.
Financial expense, not COGS.
Non-recurring legal/antitrust item, not core cost of sales.

variables.notes: Selected the direct operating cost lines related to shipping operations as COGS; excluded clearly administrative, SG&A, financial, and non-recurring legal items.

candidates.why: Explicit administrative overhead category; classic SG&A component.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Clearly labeled SG&A labor costs; should be included as an SG&A component.
Explicit SG&A bucket for other SG&A costs; appropriate SG&A component.

final_choice.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses

variables.notes: All three selected rows are explicit SG&A components and not totals or balancing items.
No research & development-related line items are present in the provided Income Statement preview; R&D expense appears not to be separately disclosed.

candidates.why: Primary aggregate interest expense line; best first-priority choice for XINT.
Component of interest expense on mortgage debt; good alternative when aggregate line missing or reclassified.
Capitalised interest, not a period expense; generally should not be treated as interest expense in PROF.
Interest component of lease liabilities; legitimate interest expense component.
Residual interest expense category; valid component for years where used.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; relevant as an additional label over time.
Balance sheet liability, not an interest expense line.
Balance sheet liability, not an interest expense line.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Interest expense is captured via the main aggregate line plus specific component labels; capitalised interest on newbuildings and balance sheet debt amounts are excluded because they are not period expense lines.

candidates.row_label: Changes in fair value of equity investments
candidates.why: Income statement fair value item, not a balance sheet equity total.
Component of equity, but not total book equity.
Explicit total equity attributable to shareholders; best match for book equity excluding any non-controlling interests.
Overall equity; appears numerically identical to shareholders’ equity, but using the shareholder-specific label avoids ambiguity about NCI.
Technical balancing row, not the economic equity total.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Technical balancing row for the accounting identity, not book equity itself.
Total of equity plus liabilities; not suitable as equity.

variables.notes: 'Shareholders' Equity - Total' appears to represent equity attributable to owners; no separate non-controlling interest line is present, so this is used as BE.
No line for non-controlling interests or minority interest appears in the Balance Sheet; MIB is therefore set to 0.
